## Working session summary

Implemented, pushed, and marked ready for review:

- PR: https://github.com/link-assistant/formal-ai/pull/794
- Final SHA: `2765db83`
- CI: [all required checks passed](https://github.com/link-assistant/formal-ai/actions/runs/29677406041)
- Merge state: clean

The fix supports source-first translation prompts through the shared language-neutral pipeline, adds en/ru/hi/zh round trips, corrects Unicode cache truncation and Russian theme-command interception, and includes regression coverage in Rust and Playwright.

Investigation artifacts:

- [Evidence index](/tmp/gh-issue-solver-1784437815860/dev/log/issues/776/pulls/794/README.md)
- [Timeline and root causes](/tmp/gh-issue-solver-1784437815860/dev/log/issues/776/pulls/794/timeline-and-root-cause.md)
- [Online research](/tmp/gh-issue-solver-1784437815860/dev/log/issues/776/pulls/794/online-research.md)
- [Final passing CI log](/tmp/gh-issue-solver-1784437815860/dev/log/issues/776/pulls/794/ci-logs/ci-cd-29677406041.log)

No upstream issue was filed because the identified defects were local routing, parsing, browser-command, cache, and test-model configuration problems.

---
